title: cannot install container tools on rhel8
body:
<!--
---------------------------------------------------
BUG REPORT INFORMATION
---------------------------------------------------
Use the commands below to provide key information from your environment:
You do NOT have to include this information if this is a FEATURE REQUEST

**NOTE** A large number of issues reported against Podman are often found to already be fixed
in more current versions of the project.  Before reporting an issue, please verify the
version you are running with `podman version` and compare it to the latest release
documented on the top of Podman's [README.md](../README.md).  If they differ, please
update your version of Podman to the latest possible and retry your command before creating
an issue.

Also, there is a running list of known issues in the [Podman Troubleshooting Guide](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/master/troubleshooting.md),
please reference that page before opening a new issue.

If you are filing a bug against `podman build`, please instead file a bug
against Buildah (https://github.com/containers/buildah/issues). Podman build
executes Buildah to perform container builds, and as such the Buildah
maintainers are best equipped to handle these bugs.
-->

/kind bug


**Description**

On a fresh install of RHEL8, I am unable to install container tools, because `udica`(?) is not installable.

```
[burhan@localhost ~]$ sudo dnf upgrade
Updating Subscription Management repositories.
Red Hat Enterprise Linux 8 for x86_64 - High Availability (RPMs)                                     1.4 kB/s | 4.0 kB     00:02    
Red Hat Enterprise Linux 8 for x86_64 - Supplementary (RPMs)                                         2.3 kB/s | 3.8 kB     00:01    
Red Hat Enterprise Linux 8 for x86_64 - AppStream (Source RPMs)                                      2.3 kB/s | 3.8 kB     00:01    
Red Hat Enterprise Linux 8 for x86_64 - AppStream (RPMs)                                             2.4 kB/s | 4.5 kB     00:01    
Red Hat CodeReady Linux Builder for RHEL 8 x86_64 (RPMs)                                             1.7 kB/s | 4.5 kB     00:02    
Red Hat Enterprise Linux 8 for x86_64 - BaseOS (Source RPMs)                                         1.2 kB/s | 3.8 kB     00:03    
Red Hat CodeReady Linux Builder for RHEL 8 x86_64 (Source RPMs)                                      1.1 kB/s | 3.8 kB     00:03    
Red Hat Enterprise Linux 8 for x86_64 - Supplementary (Source RPMs)                                  1.7 kB/s | 3.7 kB     00:02     
Red Hat Enterprise Linux 8 for x86_64 - BaseOS (RPMs)                                                2.6 kB/s | 4.1 kB     00:01    
Dependencies resolved.
Nothing to do.
Complete!
[burhan@localhost ~]$ sudo yum module install container-tools:rhel8 -y
Updating Subscription Management repositories.
Last metadata expiration check: 0:22:37 ago on Mon 31 Aug 2020 09:12:28 AM +03.
Error: Will not install a source rpm package (udica-0.2.1-2.module+el8.2.1+6465+1a51e8b6.src).
```

comments.body: Can you file a Bugzilla about this?
closing this as it is a distribution bug
